category_sources: Official Cozystack docs call Talm a declarative CLI tool for installing and configuring Kubernetes on a Talos Linux cluster and recommend it for infrastructure-as-code and GitOps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project title Talm; Cozystack docs refer to the tool as Talm.
docs_sources: Official Cozystack documentation has a dedicated Talm guide; official GitHub README provides installation and getting started usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/cozystack/talm; repo not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Cozystack docs describe Talm as a declarative CLI for Talos Linux cluster configuration, optimized for GitOps and infrastructure-as-code; source_facts.executables lists talm.
